mapper.select: select id, name, start_station, end_station from line order by id asc

select * from line
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by created_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into line (name, code, total_length, designed_speed, status, start_station, end_station, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{totalLength}, #{designedSpeed}, #{status}, #{startStation}, #{endStation}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy})
mapper.update: update line set name = #{name}, code = #{code}, total_length = #{totalLength}, designed_speed = #{designedSpeed}, status = #{status}, start_station = #{startStation}, end_station = #{endStation}, updated_time = now(), updated_by = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from ticket where line_id = #{lineId}
